notes: Roughly captures the mantle-fin silhouette and arm cluster of the input squid but linework is jagged and noisy, the two long tentacles are missing, and stippling is randomly scattered rather than reading as chromatophore fields.
specific_issues: jagged broken outline instead of clean continuous single-weight ink
two long tentacles from photo (extending up-left and down) are absent
eye reduced to a tiny indistinct mark, no almond shape or pupil
no ring suckers indicated along arms
stipple scattered uniformly across body rather than concentrated in chromatophore zones visible in photo
noisy photo-trace artifacts along silhouette edge
arm tips lack tapered curl detail seen in the photo
overall reads as edge-detection trace rather than scientific plate
